title: Zachary Humphery’s CV
text:
Game Developer, Software Development Student.

zachary.humphreys@gmail.com | Download PDF



Studying Software Development at BYU-Idaho.


Programming, web development, game development.


Lua, Luau, C#, C++, Python, JavaScript, TypeScript, Sqlite, MySQL, HTML, CSS.



Angular, Avalonia, Blazor, Express, Polars, Mongoose, .NET, NoSQL.



Web Development, Full-stack Web Development.




Game development, computational geometry, machine learning, procedural generation, and physics simulations.




2022-now Brigham Young University - Idaho
Expected graduation date: Fall 2026



2025-now Engine Developer at Crazyblox Games.

Created a dedicated server for 100-200 daily players to anonymously upload data to.
Developed new features for long-term monetization practice, increasing profits by 20%.
Built a new character controller providing more responsive feedback to players.





E-Waste Analytica - First data science project for predicting e-waste by country.
Metromata - Realtime GIS mapping system for public buses under the Metropolitan Atlanta Rapid Transit Authority.
Netport - Basic file sharing server and peer-to-peer application.
